cadence: Hybrid seed: curated dashboard data plus scheduled official UFC source checks.

sources.label: UFC Events
sources.headline: Official UFC Events page
sources.summary: Use this as the official event and bout-order verification source before fight night.
sources.nextAction: Compare official event listings with curated upcoming-card data.

sources.label: UFC News
sources.headline: Official UFC News page
sources.summary: Use this for headlines, injury notes, interviews, and fight-week media updates.
sources.nextAction: Refresh dashboard news pulse from recent official headlines.

sources.label: UFC Rankings
sources.headline: Official UFC Rankings page
sources.summary: Use this to recalibrate ranked-fighter labels and division radar after UFC updates rankings.
sources.nextAction: Compare official rankings with curated ranking impact notes.

notes: The dashboard keeps curated fan analysis locally: card heat, why-it-matters notes, prospect labels, alerts, and ranking impact.
This snapshot is the official-source layer. A scheduled workflow can refresh it without changing the dashboard UI code.
